# SRE — Start • Restart • Explore

> SRE is a free gamified self-growth ecosystem platform built around progression, accountability, consistency, and community-driven improvement. It unifies learning progression, fitness tracking, content creation journeys, social discovery, AI-assisted learning, and live updates into one platform.

## What this platform does
- Learning tracker: create study topics, log entries, track progress with charts and AI tutoring
- Fitness tracker: log workouts & meals, AI macro/burn estimation, weight progress charts
- Content creation tracker: manage series, track pipeline stages (idea → drafting → editing → published), AI script reviews
- Time management: smart task classification, focus timer, productivity insights, AI day planner
- Social feed: share progress updates, follow friends, earn XP and achievements
- Discover: topic, post, user, and group discovery with hashtag-based search
- AI Hub: 5 specialized AI assistants (Learning, Fitness, Content, Time, Navigation) with conversation history
- Gamification: 100+ achievements, XP system, levels, streaks, daily quests, leaderboards
- Blog: read and write articles on self-growth, fitness, learning, and productivity
- Groups & messaging: create/join groups, direct messages, community discussions

## Who it helps
Students, self-improvement enthusiasts, beginners learning skills, fitness learners, content creators, productivity-focused individuals, and anyone building consistent habits.

## Platform philosophy
SRE stands for Start • Restart • Explore — representing starting new journeys, restarting abandoned goals, and exploring new domains. The platform is 100% free forever and supported by non-intrusive advertising.

## AI Assistants
- Learning AI: Study assistance, concept explanations, study plans, learning strategies
- Fitness AI: Workout planning, nutrition advice, form tips, macro calculations
- Content AI: Script writing, content strategy, platform optimization, creative ideas
- Time AI: Task prioritization, focus techniques, scheduling, habit building
- Navigator AI: Platform navigation, feature discovery, section guidance with clickable route links

## Key Public URLs
- Home: https://sretrack.vercel.app/
- Landing: https://sretrack.vercel.app/landing
- Feed (guest): https://sretrack.vercel.app/feed
- Discover (guest): https://sretrack.vercel.app/discover
- Blog: https://sretrack.vercel.app/blog
- About: https://sretrack.vercel.app/about
- Contact: https://sretrack.vercel.app/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://sretrack.vercel.app/privacy
- Terms: https://sretrack.vercel.app/terms
- Community Guidelines: https://sretrack.vercel.app/community-guidelines

## Key Authenticated URLs
- Dashboard: /home
- Learning: /learn
- Fitness: /fitness
- Content: /content
- Time: /time
- AI Hub: /ai-hub
- Leaderboard: /leaderboard
- Achievements: /achievements
- Analytics: /analytics
- Profile: /profile
- Settings: /settings

## Crawlability
- robots.txt allows Googlebot, Bingbot, GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, and other AI crawlers
- Sitemap available at /sitemap.xml
- Blog posts are dynamically included in sitemap
- Public pages (feed, discover, blog, profiles) are accessible to crawlers via middleware bot detection
- Structured data: WebSite, Organization, SoftwareApplication, BlogPosting schemas

## Technical
- Built with Next.js 15, React 19, Tailwind CSS, Prisma, Neon PostgreSQL
- Deployed on Vercel
- Uses server-side rendering for SEO-critical pages
- Client-side hydration for interactive features
